label: 棋盘格道路-多朝向
description: 将掩码区域划分为多个Voronoi子区，每个子区随机选取不同旋转角度绘制网格路网，子区边界作为主路，像多期规划叠加的复杂城市。
description-en: Divide the mask into Voronoi zones, each with a randomly rotated grid road layout; zone boundaries become main roads, producing a multi-era city planning effect.
icon: 俯视路网小图标：画面竖向分成三块，左块为正交棋盘格（0°），中间块为斜向网格（约45°），右块为另一斜向网格（约20°）；两块之间用粗琥珀色竖线表示子区边界主路；深蓝灰渐变底、白与浅灰线条对比，强调多朝向拼接与分区感，扁平简洁，24px 图标风格。

inputs.name: inputGrid
inputs.label: 输入网格
inputs.description: 源掩码网格，所有非零单元格均视为可生成道路的区域
inputs.description-en: Source mask grid; any non-zero cell is treated as a valid road-generation area.

inputs.name: mainSpacing
inputs.label: 主路间距
inputs.description: 主路网格间距（单元格数），推荐 12–40
inputs.description-en: Spacing between main road lines in grid cells. Recommended 12–40.

inputs.name: subSpacing
inputs.label: 辅路间距
inputs.description: 辅路网格间距（单元格数），推荐 4–16，需小于主路间距
inputs.description-en: Spacing between sub-road lines in grid cells. Recommended 4–16, must be less than mainSpacing.

inputs.name: mainRoadWidth
inputs.label: 主路宽度
inputs.description: 主干道宽度（单元格数），推荐 1–4
inputs.description-en: Main road thickness in grid cells. Recommended 1–4.

inputs.name: subRoadWidth
inputs.label: 辅路宽度
inputs.description: 支路宽度（单元格数），推荐 1–2
inputs.description-en: Sub-road thickness in grid cells. Recommended 1–2.

inputs.name: minParcelSize
inputs.label: 最小地块面积
inputs.description: 地块最小单元格数，小于此值的地块会被删除并用辅路填充，0 = 不过滤
inputs.description-en: Minimum parcel cell count; parcels smaller than this are removed and filled as sub-road. 0 = no filtering.

inputs.name: seed
inputs.label: 随机种子
inputs.description: 随机种子，0 表示使用当前时间（每次结果不同）
inputs.description-en: Random seed; 0 uses current timestamp for a different result each run.

outputs.name: mainRoad
outputs.label: 主路
outputs.description: 主干道掩码网格：主路单元格 = 1，其余 = 0
outputs.description-en: Main road mask grid: main road cells = 1, others = 0.

outputs.name: subRoad
outputs.label: 辅路
outputs.description: 支路掩码网格：支路单元格 = 1，其余 = 0
outputs.description-en: Sub-road mask grid: sub-road cells = 1, others = 0.

outputs.name: parcels
outputs.label: 地块
outputs.description: 多值地块网格：每个地块分配唯一整数ID（1, 2, 3…），非地块单元格 = 0
outputs.description-en: Multi-value parcel grid: each parcel has a unique integer ID (1, 2, 3…); non-parcel cells = 0.

outputs.name: nameList
outputs.label: 名称清单
outputs.description: 地块名称清单：包含每个实际存在地块的 {id, name} 条目
outputs.description-en: Parcel name list: [{id, name}] entries for every parcel that contains at least one cell.
